question: Write a C++ program that prompts the user to enter the length and width of a rectangle, then calculates and displays its area and perimeter.

test_cases.expected:
Please enter the length of the rectangle (a positive number): Please enter the width of the rectangle (a positive number): 
--- Rectangle Dimensions ---
Length:    10
Width:     5
Area:      50
Perimeter: 30

Please enter the length of the rectangle (a positive number): Please enter the width of the rectangle (a positive number): 
--- Rectangle Dimensions ---
Length:    7.5
Width:     3.2
Area:      24
Perimeter: 21.4

Please enter the length of the rectangle (a positive number): Invalid input. Please enter a positive number for length.
Please enter the length of the rectangle (a positive number): Invalid input. Please enter a positive number for length.
Please enter the length of the rectangle (a positive number): Please enter the width of the rectangle (a positive number): Invalid input. Please enter a positive number for width.
Please enter the width of the rectangle (a positive number): 
--- Rectangle Dimensions ---
Length:    5
Width:     8
Area:      40
Perimeter: 26
